page_content:
B. Qualiﬁcation for In-State Status

Generally, to qualify for in#state status, prospective, returning, or current students must demonstrate that they are permanent Maryland residents. Under certain circumstances, as set forth in this Policy, students who are not permanent Maryland residents may qualify temporarily for in# state status. Students who do not qualify for in#state status under this Policy shall be assigned out#of#state status for admission and tuition purposes.
